arts.ttl: Chelsea and Manchester United interested in same player – Great quality and dynamism
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea are one of the sides ‘interested’ in Flamengo youngster Lorran as he continues to rise in Brazil. That’s according to scout Marco Palma, who has this week appeared on Tuttomercatoweb radio and picked out the 18-year-old as one of two players to keep an eye on. arts.ttl: I won the Champions League with Chelsea but left for Real Madrid after call on team bus
arts.sum: At the time, Chelsea were gearing up for their UEFA Super Cup clash with Atletico Madrid, and the bus was pulling out of the hotel car park when Essien's agent phoned him to confirm that the move was happening and that he needed to get off and return to his hotel room to sort the minor details out. So when the chance to join Madrid and reunite with his former manager Jose Mourinho came up, Essien jumped at it.

arts.ttl: Chelsea make SHOCK transfer decision after '90% done' message
arts.sum: Chelsea have decided to pursue a move for AC Milan midfielder Tijjani Reijnders, despite the fact he is on the verge of signing a new contract with the Serie A giants. Barcelona are also eager to sign the 26-year-old, as per Fichajes, but he is expected to snub transfer interest from across Europe in order to sign a new contract at Milan.

arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly ready to test Chelsea's resolve regarding Christopher Nkunku by offering a player in part-exchange.

arts.ttl: Chelsea can dominate in next five to 10 years - Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca says his side will become a dominant force in the Premier League within the next five to 10 years.
